content.text:
Based on my analysis of the molecule, I have identified all neighbour atoms of atom index 25 (Carbon). Here are the results:

## Summary

**Atom 25 (C)** has **3 neighbour atoms**:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 24 | C (Carbon) |
| 26 | C (Carbon) |
| 28 | Cl (Chlorine) |

**Geomconf Index:** 9243

From the visualization, atom C:25 is part of a benzene ring structure on the right side of the molecule. It is covalently bonded to:
- **C:24** - the adjacent carbon in the aromatic ring (which is also bonded to Cl:29)
- **C:26** - the other adjacent carbon in the aromatic ring (which has a hydrogen H:27 attached)
- **Cl:28** - a chlorine atom attached directly to C:25

This confirms that C:25 is a trisubstituted carbon in the aromatic ring system with three covalent bonds to neighbouring atoms.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 25, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
